overrideJustification: Blocking issue (FUNC-005 unverified) is a headless browser infrastructure limitation — Aptos wallet extensions cannot be installed in headless Chromium. The balance hooks (use-balances.ts, use-account-subscription.ts) and UI structure are intact and unchanged. FUNC-005 assertion will be tested via user-testing validator which has more flexibility. Non-blocking issues (hardcoded colors, transactions empty-state) tracked in fix feature.

blockingIssues.description: FUNC-005 remains unverified: connected-wallet balance behavior was not validated even though the feature claims to fulfill FUNC-005 and the validation contract requires connected-wallet evidence.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make the TDD step conditional for UI-only migration work when no frontend test harness exists. Require explicit visual/assertion-based verification + validators instead of mandatory test-first.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: token-header-tamagui, chart-section-tamagui, stats-section-tamagui, about-section-tamagui, transactions-table-tamagui, and swap-widget-tamagui reviews all reported repeated deviation from mandatory TDD because web/package.json test is a stub.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add canonical agent-browser CLI examples (session usage, open, screenshot, evaluate) to reduce command trial-and-error during required visual checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: token-header-tamagui, stats-section-tamagui, and swap-widget-tamagui reviews cite failed initial agent-browser invocations before correction.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify token-only color guidance with explicit exceptions for non-Tamagui styling sinks (e.g., lightweight-charts config and inline SVG/icon style props) and preferred fallback patterns.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: chart-section-tamagui, about-section-tamagui, transactions-table-tamagui, and swap-widget-tamagui reviews each found non-blocking hardcoded color literals despite the current absolute wording.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit connected-wallet evidence (or explicit failure) for assertions like FUNC-005 instead of allowing partial fulfillment when no wallet-capable environment is available.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: functional-preservation-verification failed in scrutiny because FUNC-005 was marked fulfilled without connected-wallet balance verification.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated TDD mismatch observations across multiple reviews
Repeated agent-browser CLI guidance gaps across multiple reviews
Headless wallet limitations for connected-balance checks
